creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text: This still applies to 12.3, and to 13.0 (both supported releases as of this comment). It does not apply to 13-STABLE, or upcoming 13.1 release. It's annoying to ports, but there is a workaround, and overall my impression is that this is a "meh, whatevs" kind of thing which might have been errata'ed in 2021 but just isn't worth having on my bug list anymore.
